TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-tribalhistory_sinay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hang malingatu kaku i mahini musakamutu pakainiay i i tawya ay henay nuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: ħaŋ mar~ɾiŋatu kaku i maħini musakamutu pakainiaj i i tawja aj ħənaj nujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: hang malingatu kaku i mahini musakamutu pakainiay i i tawya ay henay nuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: ħaŋ mar~ɾiŋatu kaku i maħini musakamutu pakainiaj i i tawja aj ħənaj nujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 我現在要說有關祖先的事.
I am going to talk about the ancestors.

S.FORM: nu ayawan nu cacay alasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan a mihcaan nai tiniay i Takubuanan kiza kuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: nu ajawan nu ʦaʦaj ar~ɾasubu izaw ku tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan nai tiniaj i takubuanan kiza kujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: nu ayawan nu cacay alasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan a mihcaan nai tiniay i Takubuanan kiza kuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: nu ajawan nu ʦaʦaj ar~ɾasubu izaw ku tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan nai tiniaj i takubuanan kiza kujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 一百三十年前祖先在達固部岸部落.
One hundred and thirty years ago, the ancestors were in Takubuan tribe.

S.FORM: yu mahiza satu nuyni u hulam yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: ju maħiza satu nujni u ħur~ɾam ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.FORM: yu mahiza satu nuyni u hulam yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: ju maħiza satu nujni u ħur~ɾam ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 當時被清兵攻擊.

TRANSL.notes: At that time, (they) were attacked by Mainland Chinese.

S.TRANSL: At that time, were attacked by Mainland Chinese.

S.FORM: saka maliwasak kuyni u niyazu' nai tizaay i Takubuan.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾiwasak kujni u nijazuʔ~ʡ nai tizaaj i takubuan.
S.FORM: saka maliwasak kuyni u niyazu' nai tizaay i Takubuan.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾiwasak kujni u nijazuʔ~ʡ nai tizaaj i takubuan.
S.TRANSL: 所以達固部岸部落就分散了.
Therefore, Tkubuan tribe scattered.

S.FORM: uyni hantu u babalaki nu niyam kya a hican.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu u babar~ɾaki nu nijam kja a ħiʦan.
S.FORM: uyni hantu u babalaki nu niyam kya a hican.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu u babar~ɾaki nu nijam kja a ħiʦan.
S.TRANSL: 至於我們的祖先們該如何?
How were our ancestors?

S.FORM: u namu hantu a balucu' mikilim tuyni u kauzipan u kakalukan i sa kuyni ci Kumud Pazik u tumuk nu Takubuan.
S.PHON: u namu ħantu a bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ mikir~ɾim tujni u kauzipan u kakar~ɾukan i sa kujni ʦi kumud pazik u tumuk nu takubuan.
S.FORM: u namu hantu a balucu' mikilim tuyni u kauzipan u kakalukan i sa kuyni ci Kumud Pazik u tumuk nu Takubuan.
S.PHON: u namu ħantu a bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ mikir~ɾim tujni u kauzipan u kakar~ɾukan i sa kujni ʦi kumud pazik u tumuk nu takubuan.
S.TRANSL: 達固部岸的頭目Kumud Pazik 說你們去尋找生存的地方與耕地.
Kumud Pazik, the leader of Takubuan tribe, said that you went to find the places for living and farming.

S.FORM: saka maini tini i wali kuyni u babalaki milakec tuyni u alangahay i tini i hualiandachiau.
S.PHON: saka maini tini i war~ɾi kujni u babar~ɾaki mir~ɾakəʦ tujni u ar~ɾaŋaħaj i tini i ħuar~ɾiandaʦħiau.
S.FORM: saka maini tini i wali kuyni u babalaki milakec tuyni u alangahay i tini i hualiandachiau.
S.PHON: saka maini tini i war~ɾi kujni u babar~ɾaki mir~ɾakəʦ tujni u ar~ɾaŋaħaj i tini i ħuar~ɾiandaʦħiau.

TRANSL.notes: 祖先從東邊涉水過河(現今的花蓮大橋).

S.TRANSL: 祖先從東邊涉水過河 .
The ancestors waded the river, Hualian bridge, from the east.

S.FORM: maini i wali tatimul sa katukuh i tini i Kaluwa kya.
S.PHON: maini i war~ɾi tatimur~ɾ sa katukuħ i tini i kar~ɾuwa kja.
S.FORM: maini i wali tatimul sa katukuh i tini i Kaluwa kya.
S.PHON: maini i war~ɾi tatimur~ɾ sa katukuħ i tini i kar~ɾuwa kja.
S.TRANSL: 往南抵達Kaluwa.

TRANSL.notes: (They) went south to Kaluwa.

S.TRANSL: went south to Kaluwa.

S.FORM: E pinaay ku demiad hakya u labi i hakya mimelaw tuyni u kaka kakaliumahan i tiza kakalukan.
S.PHON: ə pinaaj ku dəmiad ħakja u r~ɾabi i ħakja mimər~ɾaw tujni u kaka kakar~ɾiumaħan i tiza kakar~ɾukan.
S.FORM: E pinaay ku demiad hakya u labi i hakya mimelaw tuyni u kaka kakaliumahan i tiza kakalukan.
S.PHON: ə pinaaj ku dəmiad ħakja u r~ɾabi i ħakja mimər~ɾaw tujni u kaka kakar~ɾiumaħan i tiza kakar~ɾukan.
S.TRANSL: 不知多少日夜尋找耕地.

TRANSL.notes: (It took them) numerous days and nights to look for the farmland.

S.TRANSL: numerous days and nights to look for the farmland.

S.FORM: a u canan kuyu sakauzip sisa.
S.PHON: a u ʦanan kuju sakauzip sisa.
S.FORM: a u canan kuyu sakauzip sisa.
S.PHON: a u ʦanan kuju sakauzip sisa.
S.TRANSL: 要如何生活呢?
How do they make a living?

S.FORM: i tatenga' mimelawmelaw kuyni u babalaki sa.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mimər~ɾawmər~ɾaw kujni u babar~ɾaki sa.
S.FORM: i tatenga' mimelawmelaw kuyni u babalaki sa.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mimər~ɾawmər~ɾaw kujni u babar~ɾaki sa.
S.TRANSL: 祖先到處看.
The ancestors looked around.

S.FORM: ca'ay i katatungus i tini i Kaluwa.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj i katatuŋus i tini i kar~ɾuwa.
S.FORM: ca'ay i katatungus i tini i Kaluwa.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj i katatuŋus i tini i kar~ɾuwa.

TRANSL.notes: Kaluwa 不適合(生活).

S.TRANSL: Kaluwa 不適合 .

TRANSL.notes: Kaluwa was not suitable (for life).

S.TRANSL: Kaluwa was not suitable .

S.FORM: isa nayay kuyza u nanum cay kaitaneng.
S.PHON: isa najaj kujza u nanum ʦaj kaitanəŋ.
S.FORM: isa nayay kuyza u nanum cay kaitaneng.
S.PHON: isa najaj kujza u nanum ʦaj kaitanəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 因為水不夠.
Because water was not enough.

S.FORM: mahiza satu sa nu tulutuluaytu a labi kya i tiza ku nika pilabi tatenga'.
S.PHON: maħiza satu sa nu tur~ɾutur~ɾuajtu a r~ɾabi kja i tiza ku nika pir~ɾabi tatəŋaʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: mahiza satu sa nu tulutuluaytu a labi kya i tiza ku nika pilabi tatenga'.
S.PHON: maħiza satu sa nu tur~ɾutur~ɾuajtu a r~ɾabi kja i tiza ku nika pir~ɾabi tatəŋaʔ~ʡ.

TRANSL.notes: 於是(他們在Kaluwa)停留了三晚.

S.TRANSL: 於是 停留了三晚.

TRANSL.notes: As a result, (they) stayed (in Kaluwa) three nights.

S.TRANSL: As a result, stayed three nights.

S.FORM: E taynitu i timul tayni i timul sa.
S.PHON: ə tajnitu i timur~ɾ tajni i timur~ɾ sa.
S.FORM: E taynitu i timul tayni i timul sa.
S.PHON: ə tajnitu i timur~ɾ tajni i timur~ɾ sa.
S.TRANSL: 往南走.

TRANSL.notes: (They) went south.

S.TRANSL: went south.

S.FORM: i tatenga' situl sa i tini i i tini i Maibul.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ situr~ɾ sa i tini i i tini i maibur~ɾ.
S.FORM: i tatenga' situl sa i tini i i tini i Maibul.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ situr~ɾ sa i tini i i tini i maibur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 走到馬立雲.

TRANSL.notes: (They) arrived at Maibul.

S.TRANSL: arrived at Maibul.

S.FORM: Maibul han sa nu amisan nu Sapad.
S.PHON: maibur~ɾ ħan sa nu amisan nu sapad.
S.FORM: Maibul han sa nu amisan nu Sapad.
S.PHON: maibur~ɾ ħan sa nu amisan nu sapad.
S.TRANSL: 馬立雲是在掃把頂的北邊.
Maibul is in the north of Sapad.

S.FORM: nayi' henay ku zazan tayni i hiya i timul.
S.PHON: najiʔ~ʡ ħənaj ku zazan tajni i ħija i timur~ɾ.
S.FORM: nayi' henay ku zazan tayni i hiya i timul.
S.PHON: najiʔ~ʡ ħənaj ku zazan tajni i ħija i timur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 往南邊還沒有路.
There was not way to the south.

S.FORM: uyu kakaliumahan sa a tacuwaantu i tini i hiya i Sapad.
S.PHON: uju kakar~ɾiumaħan sa a taʦuwaantu i tini i ħija i sapad.
S.FORM: uyu kakaliumahan sa a tacuwaantu i tini i hiya i Sapad.
S.PHON: uju kakar~ɾiumaħan sa a taʦuwaantu i tini i ħija i sapad.
S.TRANSL: 耕地是在掃把頂.
The farmland was in Sapad.

S.FORM: ahbal kyuni u kakaliumahan.
S.PHON: aħbar~ɾ kjuni u kakar~ɾiumaħan.
S.FORM: ahbal kyuni u kakaliumahan.
S.PHON: aħbar~ɾ kjuni u kakar~ɾiumaħan.
S.TRANSL: 耕地廣闊.
The farmland was wide.

S.FORM: u palumaan nu Maibul i tawya nu babalaki sa i tini i wali.
S.PHON: u par~ɾumaan nu maibur~ɾ i tawja nu babar~ɾaki sa i tini i war~ɾi.
S.FORM: u palumaan nu Maibul i tawya nu babalaki sa i tini i wali.
S.PHON: u par~ɾumaan nu maibur~ɾ i tawja nu babar~ɾaki sa i tini i war~ɾi.

TRANSL.notes: 那時候馬立雲的住戶是住在(馬立雲的)東邊.

S.TRANSL: 那時候馬立雲的住戶是住在 東邊.

TRANSL.notes: The residents of Maibul were (living in) the eastside (of Maibul).

S.TRANSL: The residents of Maibul were the eastside .

S.FORM: i tini i zazan nu silamalay anu hiya nu cidusya nayi'ay henay kuyza u zazan nu silamalay i tawya.
S.PHON: i tini i zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj anu ħija nu ʦidusja najiʔ~ʡaj ħənaj kujza u zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj i tawja.
S.FORM: i tini i zazan nu silamalay anu hiya nu cidusya nayi'ay henay kuyza u zazan nu silamalay i tawya.
S.PHON: i tini i zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj anu ħija nu ʦidusja najiʔ~ʡaj ħənaj kujza u zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj i tawja.
S.TRANSL: 在鐵路或公路上當時還沒有鐵軌.
At that time, there was no tracks on railroad or road.

S.FORM: yu mahiza sa i mapulung i wali kuyni u luma nuyu babalaki nu Maibul.
S.PHON: ju maħiza sa i mapur~ɾuŋ i war~ɾi kujni u r~ɾuma nuju babar~ɾaki nu maibur~ɾ.
S.FORM: yu mahiza sa i mapulung i wali kuyni u luma nuyu babalaki nu Maibul.
S.PHON: ju maħiza sa i mapur~ɾuŋ i war~ɾi kujni u r~ɾuma nuju babar~ɾaki nu maibur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 當時在馬立雲的老人家,在東邊的時候還是住在一起.
At that time, the senior citizens of Maibul lived together when they were in the eastside.

S.FORM: yu pazazantu tuyni u zazan nu silamalay kya nu ayawan cacay a lasubu izaw ku cacay a bataan a mihcanan.
S.PHON: ju pazazantu tujni u zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj kja nu ajawan ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku ʦaʦaj a bataan a miħʦanan.
S.FORM: yu pazazantu tuyni u zazan nu silamalay kya nu ayawan cacay a lasubu izaw ku cacay a bataan a mihcanan.
S.PHON: ju pazazantu tujni u zazan nu sir~ɾamar~ɾaj kja nu ajawan ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku ʦaʦaj a bataan a miħʦanan.
S.TRANSL: 一百一十年前,開設鐵道了.
One hundred and yen years ago, the railroads were built.

S.FORM: i taway malingatu mabulaw kuyni u Maibul tayza i etip.
S.PHON: i tawaj mar~ɾiŋatu mabur~ɾaw kujni u maibur~ɾ tajza i ətip.
S.FORM: i taway malingatu mabulaw kuyni u Maibul tayza i etip.
S.PHON: i tawaj mar~ɾiŋatu mabur~ɾaw kujni u maibur~ɾ tajza i ətip.
S.TRANSL: 馬立雲部落開始往西遷移.
Maibul tribe began to move to the west.

S.FORM: tayni i etip sa a hican.
S.PHON: tajni i ətip sa a ħiʦan.
S.FORM: tayni i etip sa a hican.
S.PHON: tajni i ətip sa a ħiʦan.
S.TRANSL: 為何要往西?

TRANSL.notes: Why (did they) go west?

S.TRANSL: Why go west?

S.FORM: iza kuyza u nanum nu sauwac.
S.PHON: iza kujza u nanum nu sauwaʦ.
S.FORM: iza kuyza u nanum nu sauwac.
S.PHON: iza kujza u nanum nu sauwaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 河有水.
There was water in river.

S.FORM: a kapah misalaku isa.
S.PHON: a kapaħ misar~ɾaku isa.
S.FORM: a kapah misalaku isa.
S.PHON: a kapaħ misar~ɾaku isa.
S.TRANSL: 所以適合耕作水田.
So it was suitable for paddy field.

S.FORM: nu amisanan sa u alangahay.
S.PHON: nu amisanan sa u ar~ɾaŋaħaj.
S.FORM: nu amisanan sa u alangahay.
S.PHON: nu amisanan sa u ar~ɾaŋaħaj.
S.TRANSL: 北邊是河.
The north was the river.

S.FORM: melaw han sa yadah ku ili yadah kuyza kahmid.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan sa jadaħ ku ir~ɾi jadaħ kujza kaħmid.
S.FORM: melaw han sa yadah ku ili yadah kuyza kahmid.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan sa jadaħ ku ir~ɾi jadaħ kujza kaħmid.
S.TRANSL: 看到很多溪魚和螃蟹.

TRANSL.notes: (We) saw many river fish and crabs.

S.TRANSL: saw many river fish and crabs.

S.FORM: saasu'ay nu kan kuyza u nu Pangcah.
S.PHON: saasuʔ~ʡaj nu kan kujza u nu paŋʦaħ.
S.FORM: saasu'ay nu kan kuyza u nu Pangcah.
S.PHON: saasuʔ~ʡaj nu kan kujza u nu paŋʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 那些是阿美族中最好吃的食物.
Those were the most delicious foods in Amis.

S.FORM: u nu sakizaya kuyni u kalang u kahmid isaw a tuyni u ili.
S.PHON: u nu sakizaja kujni u kar~ɾaŋ u kaħmid isaw a tujni u ir~ɾi.
S.FORM: u nu sakizaya kuyni u kalang u kahmid isaw a tuyni u ili.
S.PHON: u nu sakizaja kujni u kar~ɾaŋ u kaħmid isaw a tujni u ir~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅的也是螃蟹和溪魚.
It is crabs and river fish that were delicious in Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nu amisanan nu alangahay sa u buklal mamin i tiza.
S.PHON: nu amisanan nu ar~ɾaŋaħaj sa u bukr~ɾar~ɾ mamin i tiza.
S.FORM: nu amisanan nu alangahay sa u buklal mamin i tiza.
S.PHON: nu amisanan nu ar~ɾaŋaħaj sa u bukr~ɾar~ɾ mamin i tiza.
S.TRANSL: 河的北邊都是河.
The north side of a river was all rivers.

S.FORM: mikacaw i katalalan sa mamelawtu kuyni u ngabulngabul i tawya u aadupen.
S.PHON: mikaʦaw i katar~ɾar~ɾan sa mamər~ɾawtu kujni u ŋabur~ɾŋabur~ɾ i tawja u aadupən.
S.FORM: mikacaw i katalalan sa mamelawtu kuyni u ngabulngabul i tawya u aadupen.
S.PHON: mikaʦaw i katar~ɾar~ɾan sa mamər~ɾawtu kujni u ŋabur~ɾŋabur~ɾ i tawja u aadupən.
S.TRANSL: 當時騎在牛上都可以看到鹿這樣的動物.
At that time, when we rode on a cow, we could see animals like deer.

S.FORM: u mahizaay kiza sak maenep kuyni i tini i Maibul ku i tiza i kasasauac.
S.PHON: u maħizaaj kiza sak maənəp kujni i tini i maibur~ɾ ku i tiza i kasasauaʦ.
S.FORM: u mahizaay kiza sak maenep kuyni i tini i Maibul ku i tiza i kasasauac.
S.PHON: u maħizaaj kiza sak maənəp kujni i tini i maibur~ɾ ku i tiza i kasasauaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 所以河流在馬立雲會合.
Therefore the rivers converged in Maibul.

S.FORM: nu amisanan nu kasasauac ma mahiza u sankakusin kuyza uya paenengan.
S.PHON: nu amisanan nu kasasauaʦ ma maħiza u sankakusin kujza uja paənəŋan.
S.FORM: nu amisanan nu kasasauac ma mahiza u sankakusin kuyza uya paenengan.
S.PHON: nu amisanan nu kasasauaʦ ma maħiza u sankakusin kujza uja paənəŋan.
S.TRANSL: 在河流會合的北邊是一個三角形的居住地.
The north side where the river converged was a triangle place for living.

S.FORM: a enengan nu Maibul uyu paluma'an i han nu maku kuyu u kamu sa.
S.PHON: a ənəŋan nu maibur~ɾ uju par~ɾumaʔ~ʡan i ħan nu maku kuju u kamu sa.
S.FORM: a enengan nu Maibul uyu paluma'an i han nu maku kuyu u kamu sa.
S.PHON: a ənəŋan nu maibur~ɾ uju par~ɾumaʔ~ʡan i ħan nu maku kuju u kamu sa.
S.TRANSL: 我要說的是那是馬立雲部落蓋房子居住的地方.
What I would say was the place where the Maibul trible built up their houses.

S.FORM: yu mahiza satu sa han sa uyni u babalaki paluma tu tubah paluma tuyni u kucyan paluma tuyni u hapay tuyni u tali.
S.PHON: ju maħiza satu sa ħan sa ujni u babar~ɾaki par~ɾuma tu tubaħ par~ɾuma tujni u kuʦjan par~ɾuma tujni u ħapaj tujni u tar~ɾi.
S.FORM: yu mahiza satu sa han sa uyni u babalaki paluma tu tubah paluma tuyni u kucyan paluma tuyni u hapay tuyni u tali.
S.PHON: ju maħiza satu sa ħan sa ujni u babar~ɾaki par~ɾuma tu tubaħ par~ɾuma tujni u kuʦjan par~ɾuma tujni u ħapaj tujni u tar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 那時候老人種地瓜、小米和芋頭.
At that time, the senior citizens grew sweet potatoes, millets and taros.

S.FORM: uyni u sakauzip yu mahiza henay mikilimtu misalaku i mahiza.
S.PHON: ujni u sakauzip ju maħiza ħənaj mikir~ɾimtu misar~ɾaku i maħiza.
S.FORM: uyni u sakauzip yu mahiza henay mikilimtu misalaku i mahiza.
S.PHON: ujni u sakauzip ju maħiza ħənaj mikir~ɾimtu misar~ɾaku i maħiza.
S.TRANSL: 當時找開墾水田的地方來過日子.

TRANSL.notes: At that time, (we) were looking for paddy field where we could make a living.

S.TRANSL: At that time, were looking for paddy field where we could make a living.

S.FORM: i tatanga' uyni hantu yu tatayna sa matitineng aca uyu tatayna nuyu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: i tataŋaʔ~ʡ ujni ħantu ju tatajna sa matitinəŋ aʦa uju tatajna nuju sakizaja.
S.FORM: i tatanga' uyni hantu yu tatayna sa matitineng aca uyu tatayna nuyu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: i tataŋaʔ~ʡ ujni ħantu ju tatajna sa matitinəŋ aʦa uju tatajna nuju sakizaja.

TRANSL.notes: 撒奇萊雅的女人也很會做(以下的事情).

S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅的女人也很會做 .

TRANSL.notes: Sakizaya female would also do (the following things).

S.TRANSL: Sakizaya female would also do .

TRANSL.notes: (Women) cooked vine and mixed it with bird's nest fern.

S.TRANSL: cooked vine and mixed it with bird's nest fern.

And they were looking for crabs and cockroaches by the river. Those were delicious.

S.FORM: uyza hantu yu tatama sa.
S.PHON: ujza ħantu ju tatama sa.

S.FORM: tatenga' u eli' kuyu sapadahung.

S.TRANSL: The roof was the thatch, indeed.

Then life was getting better and better.

S.TRANSL: 當時的生活哪裡有像現在這樣.
Life in the past was not like that in nowadays.

S.TRANSL: eradicated the tree and dug out the stone.

S.TRANSL: 在當時每一戶人家種的田很寬.
The farmlands on which every family worked were wide at that time.

The place with acute shape was the mountains of Maibul.

S.TRANSL: When transporting logs, women had to prepare foods.

S.TRANSL: mashed glutinous rice or millet to make rice cakes.

TRANSL.notes: When (men) were transporting logs, Sakizaya women were so competent.

S.TRANSL: When were transporting logs, Sakizaya women were so competent.

S.FORM: anu misulul kuyu tatama tuyni u kilang han nu maku.

What I would say was that men transported logs.

There were some which stood; they were houses and called "Tika".

The roof was covered with tiles.

The house that had ceiling was a good one.

S.FORM: nu tenzyo nayay kaku an sa sa cay kapatenzyo.

S.FORM: ya han nu maku kuyni u kamu.

S.FORM: ya han nu maku kuyni u kamu.

S.FORM: satu sa u yu lipun yu mahiza izawtu kuyni u lipun maputuh kuyni u lipun.

S.FORM: uyza hantu uyu nikalukan nuyni nu babalaki i tini i Sapat sa alawen nuyni u lipun.

The old people's farmland in Sapat were taken away by the Japanese.

S.FORM: yu mahiza cay paacai ku babalaki.

S.FORM: yu mahiza cay paacai ku babalaki.
S.PHON: ju maħiza ʦaj paaʦai ku babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家沒有賣.
The senior citizens did not sell.

S.FORM: palumaen nu lipun tuyni u kohi mahizaay kiza ku nika uzip nu babalaki u kakadihi an kuyni u babalaki mahiza nuyni u sakizaya i han nu maku kuyni u kamu.

S.TRANSL: 我就這樣說日本人就種咖啡,老人這樣生活非常可憐.
